pr_text:
## Title: Add F1AP-aware force_RRC_IDLE telnet command for UE state management

### Summary
Add a new telnet command to manually force a UE into RRC_IDLE state via the F1AP interface. This addresses F1AP interface handling errors between CU and DU that can cause message loss or corruption during UE state transitions. Previously, the telnet interface lacked a mechanism to directly trigger RRC_IDLE transitions, making it difficult to recover from F1AP synchronization issues or debug state machine
